title: Meriania denticulata
taxonomy: Meriania denticulata belongs to the family Melastomataceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the melastome family. This family is native to the Americas, with species found in the tropical and subtropical regions. Meriania denticulata is a species of flowering plant that is endemic to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the family Melastomataceae, Meriania denticulata is part of the genus Meriania, which consists of various species of plants. The classification of Meriania denticulata reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Melastomataceae family.
